untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental ranking logic (Dogs of the Dow selection by dividend yield, then filtering 'Small Dogs' by lowest stock price) and portfolio-level stock screening across index constituents. This is a portfolio/index selection rule, not a price-action rule on a single instrument. Requires external data source (Dow 30 constituents, dividend yields, market cap filtering) and multi-asset ranking logic not expressible through single-instrument technical indicators and price operators.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_14 is a stock selection/rotation strategy requiring: (1) identification of Dogs of the Dow (typically top 10 highest dividend yield stocks in Dow 30), (2) filtering to smallest market cap or lowest price among those 10, (3) equal-weight or cap-weight rebalancing. This is a fundamental/quantitative screening rule, not a technical entry/exit signal. The backtest engine would need portfolio construction logic, dividend data, and constituent tracking to implement this strategy.
